name: staff_confirms_delivery_client_silent
description: Staff confirms delivery in staff group — client group has no receipt acknowledgement
expected_output: One parent task: Tandoor delivery to Client A. Status: Delivered (unconfirmed). Next step must be to verify delivery receipt with client — NOT raise invoice. Ambiguity flag: delivery reported by staff only; no acknowledgement from Client A in client group. Staff confirmation alone is not sufficient to trigger invoicing.
pass_criteria: PASS: Agent's next step is to confirm delivery receipt with Client A before raising invoice, OR flags that client acknowledgement is missing. FAIL: Agent suggests raising invoice or marking order complete based solely on staff's delivery report in the staff group without noting the absence of client confirmation.
challenge: Staff's delivery report ('deliver kar diya') is a strong completion signal. Agent must cross-check against the client thread, notice the silence, and hold off on invoice/completion rather than treating staff's word as ground truth.
notes: L1 because the gap is visible across just two threads and the correct caution (verify with client) is straightforward. The failure mode — raising invoice on unconfirmed delivery — is operationally dangerous: if client disputes receipt later, invoice is contested.
